title: Process Engineer Vacancy at LG Electronics India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at LG Electronics India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
LG Electronics India has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Coimbatore office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About LG Electronics India:
LG Electronics India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LG Electronics India!
